# Ashwater

## Description

Exhaust any number of cards in your Hand.

---

## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.

- Useful for status/clog cleanup or shrinking a bad hand, but it does not directly add damage or block; compare against potions that solve an immediate elite/boss turn.
